title: Agents frequently die at low health levels
insight: In 92% of the deaths, agents had a mean health just before death below 30 HP.

title: Agents often die near the end of episodes
insight: The mean episode length for deaths is significantly longer than for successes, indicating frequent death occurrences towards the end of runs.
evidence: Mean episode length — deaths 99 vs successes 0 steps

title: Agents frequently die in corridors
insight: Given the lack of timeouts and only a few successes, agents are likely dying due to poor corridor navigation or combat strategies.
evidence: No timeouts reported; only 0 successes out of 820 runs
